title: Fig. 5. Russula micangshanensis Y in Phylogenetic and morphological evidence for four new species of Russula (Russulaceae, Basidiomycota) from northwestern China
author: Song, Yu
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Fig. 5. Russula micangshanensis Y.Song sp. nov. A–H. Fruiting bodies. A, H. Holotype (SERC2201). B–C. SERC2202. D. SERC2303. E. SERC2304. F. SERC2305. G. SERC2307. I. Basidiospores in Melzer's reagent showing the amyloid ornamentations (SERC2201). Scale bars: A–H = 1 cm; I = 10 µm.
